[Adblock Plus 2.0]
! Title: Test Filter List
! Last modified: 2025-01-01
! Homepage: https://example.com
!
! Standard blocking rules
||ads.example.com^
||tracking.example.org^
||telemetry.test.net^$third-party
||cdn.analytics.io^$script,image
!
! Exception rules
@@||safe-ads.example.com^
@@||example.com/acceptable-ads$document
!
! Cosmetic filters
example.com##.ad-banner
example.org##div[id="sponsored"]
!
! Extended CSS filters
example.com#?#div:has(> .ad-label)
